plot outline: Set in the year 2010, Dr. Moreau has successfully combined human and animal DNA to make a crossbreed animal. Well, as usual, something goes wrong and David Thewlis must try to stop it before it is too late. Originally rated R, but cut by Frankenheimer to allow "a wider audience".
title: The Island of Dr. Moreau
akas: D.N.A. - The Island of Dr. Moreau (Japan, English title)
DNA - Die Insel des Dr. Moreau (Germany)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
